---
title: "Course schedule"
---

::: {.callout-note}
**Apart** from the **starting time** the time schedule is **indicative**. Because we can not plan a course by the minute, in practice the time points will deviate. 
:::

## Day 1

| block         | start | end   | topic                                                        | instructor                   | presentation | exercise |
|---------------|-------|-------|--------------------------------------------------------------|------------------------------|--------------|----------|
| introduction  | 9:00  | 9:30  | Introduction to the course                                   | Deepak Tanwar                |  [link](../assets/pdf/01_introduction.pdf) | |
| block 1       | 9:30  | 10:15 | Introduction to spatial omics                                | Joana Carlevaro-Fita         |  [link](../assets/pdf/02_introduction_spatial_omics.pdf)  | |
| break         | 10:15 | 10:45 | Coffee break                                                 |                              | | |
| block 2       | 10:45 | 11:45 | Segmentation                                                 | Ivan Berest                  |  [link](../assets/pdf/03_space_ranger_spe.pdf) | |
| block 3       | 11:45 | 12:30 | Lecture: pre-processing, and data structure                  | Deepak Tanwar               |  [link](../assets/pdf/03_space_ranger_spe.pdf) | |
| break         | 12:30 | 13:30 | Lunch                                                        |                              | | |
| block 3       | 11:45 | 12:30 | Exercise: setup and data structure                           | Deepak Tanwar, Julien Roux  | | [Setup](../day1/day1-0_setup.qmd), [Exercise 1](../day1/day1-1_SpatialExperiment.qmd) |

| block 3       | 1:30  | 3:00  | Quality control and normalization                            | Deepak Tanwar        |  [QC and normalization](../assets/pdf/04_qc_norm.pdf)  | [Exercise 2](../day1/day1-2_spotsweeper_qc.qmd) |
| break         | 3:00  | 3:30  |                                                              |                       | | |
| block 4       | 3:30  | 5:15  | Feature selection, dimensionality reduction                  | Joana Carlevaro-Fita |  [Intermediate processing](../assets/pdf/05_preprocessing.pdf) |  [Exercise 3](../day1/day1-3_feature_dimred_cluster.qmd)  |


## Day 2

| block   | start | end   | topic                                                 | instructor           | presentation | exercise |
|---------|-------|-------|-------------------------------------------------------|----------------------|--------------|----------|
| block 1 | 9:15  | 10:30 | Clustering and annotation                             | Joana Carlevaro-Fita |  [Clustering](../assets/pdf/06_spatial_domains.pdf)  | [Exercise 4](../day1/day1-4_clustering_find_markers.qmd) |
| break   | 10:30 | 11:00 |                                                       |                      |  |  |
| block 2 | 11:00 | 11:45 | Spatial statistics                                    | Mark Robinson        | [Statistical methods](../assets/pdf/07_stats_methods.pdf) |  |
| block 2 | 11:45 | 12:30 | Co-localization analysis                              | Martin Emons         |  [Spatial stats](../assets/pdf/08_spastat_lecture.pdf)  |          |
| break   | 12:30 | 1:30 |                                                        |                      |  |  |
| block 3 | 1:30  | 2:15  | Exercises: co-localisation analysis                   | Martin Emons         |              | [Exercise 5](../day2/day2-1_spatial_stats.qmd) |
| block 3 | 2:15  | 3:00  | SVG and DSP for spatial data                          | Peiying Cai          |  [SVG and DSP](../assets/pdf/09_svg_dsp.pdf) |          |
| break   | 3:00  | 3:30  |                                                       |                      |  |  |
| block 4 | 3:30  | 4:15  | Exercise: SVG and DSP for spatial data                | Peiying Cai          |              | [Exercise 6](../day2/day2-2_svg_feature_set_signatures.qmd), [Exercise 7](../day2/day2-3_differential_spatial_pattern.qmd) |
| post-course | 4:15  | 4:30  | Post-course information                           | Deepak Tanwar        | [Closing remarks](../assets/pdf/10_post_course.pdf)  |          |
